title: Anomali ThreatStream Threat Intelligence
description: Comprehensive dashboard for monitoring Anomali ThreatStream Threat Intelligence enrichment. Provides IOC detection trends, geographic analysis for IP indicators, detailed drill-down tables, and correlated Cloud SIEM Security Signals.

definition.content:
[Anomali ThreatStream](https://www.anomali.com/products/threatstream) is a threat intelligence platform (TIP) that automates the collection, curation, and analysis of threat data from global, open-source, and premium feeds.

This dashboard provides comprehensive visibility into IOCs detected by **Anomali ThreatStream** enrichment, including detection trends, geographic analysis for IP-based indicators, and correlated Cloud SIEM Security Signals.

For setup and configuration, see the [Anomali ThreatStream Datadog Integration Documentation](https://docs.datadoghq.com/integrations/anomali_threatstream/).

**Quick Start**: Use the template variables above to filter by IOC type (SHA256, MD5, IP, Domain) and service.

definition.title: IOC Detections Over Time by Indicator Type
IOC Detections Over Time by Intention

definition.content: This section focuses on **IP-type indicators** only. The geomap shows the geographic distribution of IPs that matched Anomali ThreatStream threat intelligence, based on the `@network.client.geoip` enrichment.

custom_links.label: View Security Signals for this country

definition.content:
Security Signals generated by Cloud SIEM detection rules that were triggered on logs containing **Anomali ThreatStream threat intelligence** matches (`@threat_intel.results.source.name:anomali_threatstream`). Only signals with Anomali ThreatStream IOC enrichment are shown here.

If no signals appear, ensure [detection rules](https://docs.datadoghq.com/security/cloud_siem/log_detection_rules/) are configured to trigger on `@threat_intel` attributes.

definition.title: IOC Details Drill-Down (Type / Intention / Category / Indicator)

definition.content: IOC attributes specific to **Anomali ThreatStream** that are not part of the shared Cloud SIEM threat-intelligence template: source severity, targeted industries, and confidence scoring.
